description: AI Workbench — GPU · Nodes · JupyterHub · Per-User · Longhorn

options.content:
AI Workbench Monitor
Data Engineering and Semantics Research Unit  ·  Kubernetes  ·  JupyterHub  ·  GPU Cluster  ·  Longhorn Storage

targets.expr: (1 - sum by(nodename)(node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes * on(instance) group_left(nodename) node_uname_info{nodename=~"$node"}) / sum by(nodename)(node_memory_MemTotal_bytes * on(instance) group_left(nodename) node_uname_info{nodename=~"$node"})) * 100

panels.title: CPU Utilisation over Time — per Node

targets.expr: sum by(nodename)((node_memory_MemTotal_bytes - node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) node_uname_info{nodename=~"$node"})

panels.title: RAM Consumption over Time — per Node
Running Sessions — Username · Node · RAM · CPU

options.content: ℹ️ GPU metrics are attributed per notebook pod via DCGM Kubernetes mode. Only pods with an active GPU allocation (e.g. profile a2-1gpu) appear in the panels below. CPU-only notebook pods show no data here — which is correct.

panels.title: Longhorn Storage I/O — Total Write and Read Throughput
